pageSubtitle: Your company details appear on every TwinLog Trail compliance record. Required for PDF generation.
profileComplete: Profile complete. You can download TwinLog Trail records.
companyName.label: Company Name *
companyName.description: As it appears on your Certificate of Incorporation
registeredAddress.label: Registered Office Address *
registeredAddress.description: Full address including postcode/ZIP. Must match incorporation documents.
country.label: Country of Registration *
vat.label: VAT Number
eori.label: EORI Number
eori.description: Economic Operators Registration and Identification number. Required by UK/EU customs to track every shipment. Without this, your compliance record cannot reference your customs identity.
eori.whyBody: Your EORI number is what customs authorities use to identify you on every import declaration. A compliance record without an EORI cannot be linked to your customs activity. UK traders: apply at gov.uk/eori. EU traders: apply via your national customs authority.
ein.label: EIN (Employer Identification Number)
ein.description: US Federal Tax ID issued by the IRS (format: XX-XXXXXXX). Used as the Importer of Record number for US Customs and Border Protection (CBP).
ein.whyBody: The EIN is the US equivalent of the EORI number. It identifies your business on all US customs entry documents filed with CBP. If you import into the USA, your EIN serves as your Importer of Record (IOR) number. Apply at irs.gov/ein. Note: the USA does not use the EORI system — if you also ship to the EU/UK, you will need both an EIN and an EORI.
contactEmail.label: Contact Email
contactEmail.description: Appears on the compliance record as the responsible party contact.
toast.noCustomsId: No EORI or EIN number saved. We recommend adding your EORI (EU/UK) or EIN (US) before sharing records with banks or customs authorities.
toast.einSaved: EIN saved. If you also trade with the EU/UK, consider adding your EORI number.
toast.eoriSaved: EORI saved. If you also trade with the US, consider adding your EIN.
toast.allSaved: You can now download TwinLog Trail records.
warning.noCustomsId: No customs identification number saved. Add your EORI (EU/UK traders) or EIN (US traders) before sharing records with banks or customs authorities.
